_comment: Illustrative routes — VERIFY every address against the bridge's own docs/source before trusting a result. Override with EVMSEC_BRIDGES=/path/to/your.json. Contributions of verified routes welcome.

routes.notes: Polygon PoS ERC20 bridge: tokens lock in the RootChainManager/predicate on L1 and a mapped child token is minted on Polygon. Addresses here are illustrative — confirm the current predicate/escrow before relying on the number.
